amazonListingFocus: 800x1280 compact screen for embedded and control-panel use
9mm slim CNC metal body with 249g portability
Mini HDMI plus dual USB-C connectivity for SBC, handheld and mini PC workflows

sizeOverrideHints.cameraDistance: Use tight framing so the 7-inch panel still feels substantial in product shots.
sizeOverrideHints.uiScale: Increase UI scale to keep icons and touch targets readable on the compact panel.
sizeOverrideHints.copyDensity: Focus copy on touch, compactness and embedded-device compatibility rather than large-screen productivity.

summary.title: LuminaDisplay 7-inch Amazon Scene Preview
summary.subtitle: Touch-focused, embedded-friendly listing scenes derived from product config and size-specific overrides.
summary.description: Compact scene pack focused on touch, CNC build, SBC compatibility, compact entertainment and install flexibility.
focus: 800x1280 compact screen for embedded and control-panel use
9mm slim CNC metal body with 249g portability
Mini HDMI plus dual USB-C connectivity for SBC, handheld and mini PC workflows

videoStoryboard: 0-03s: pure-white hero opener with the compact 7-inch front view and a short touch-screen headline.
03-07s: transition into the full-lamination touch shot with a subtle finger tap and ripple feedback.
07-12s: cut to the compact CNC side-profile shot to sell 9mm slimness and 249g portability.
12-17s: move into the Raspberry Pi or control-panel setup and show compact dashboard usability.
17-21s: switch to the handheld or mini-console entertainment scene with a bright compact UI.
21-25s: isolate the side ports and explain Mini HDMI, dual USB-C and audio support.
25-30s: close on the rear shell, VESA area and built-in speakers before returning to the hero angle.

scenes.label: IMG-01 主图 Hero
scenes.objective: 突出 7 英寸 IPS 触摸屏的紧凑精致感，同时保持主图合规。
scenes.headline: 7-inch IPS Touch Monitor
scenes.subheadline: Pure-white hero frame. No copy. No props. Tight framing for a compact product.
copyLines: 小尺寸主图必须用更近的镜头，避免画面发空。
保持屏幕高亮，但不要盖掉边框与品牌位。
renderHints: 主图机身比例必须真实，避免把 7 寸做成平板错觉。
边框边缘高光更锋利，强化 CNC 精度感。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon main image
Primary request: create a photorealistic 3D hero render for a compact 7-inch touch portable monitor listing
Scene/backdrop: pure white studio background
Subject: black 7-inch portable monitor with a slim 9mm CNC aluminum body, thin bezels and a centered LuminaDisplay brand mark on the lower bezel
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D product render
Composition/framing: front-facing hero shot with a slight top-down camera angle; keep the product filling about 88 percent of the frame so the small size still feels substantial
Lighting/mood: clean high-key studio lighting with crisp edge reflections and controlled screen glow
Color palette: white background, black metal body, cool cyan-blue screen glow
Materials/textures: CNC aluminum alloy with subtle brushed reflections; glossy IPS touch surface
Text (verbatim): ""
Constraints: main-image compliant; no props; no cables; no text overlays; no watermark; show only the sold product
Avoid: empty framing, oversized accessories, stylized illustration look, overexposed screen

scenes.label: IMG-02 全贴合触摸卖点图
scenes.objective: 突出 Full Lamination Touch 是 7 寸型号最关键的差异化卖点。
scenes.headline: Full Lamination Touch
scenes.subheadline: Direct, precise interaction for compact interfaces
compliance: 手指不能遮挡大部分 UI
副图文案保持两层结构
copyLines: 触摸波纹要克制，像真实 UI 反馈，而不是科幻特效。
紧贴玻璃面的 UI 元素要大且简洁。
renderHints: 手指边缘做柔和反光，避免显得像塑料手模。
屏幕玻璃反射保持清爽，触点区域最亮。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon feature image
Primary request: create a premium 3D touch-feature render for a 7-inch portable monitor with full lamination touch
Scene/backdrop: clean studio setup with a soft dark-to-teal gradient background
Subject: compact 7-inch monitor showing a touch-friendly dashboard while a fingertip lightly taps the screen with a subtle ripple effect
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D advertising render
Composition/framing: medium close-up framing; finger enters only partially from one side; keep the UI and touch contact point clearly visible
Lighting/mood: precise premium lighting with clear glass reflections and a focused accent on the touch point
Color palette: black metal body, teal-blue interface glow, restrained neutral background
Materials/textures: laminated glass surface, CNC aluminum shell, clean UI cards and ripple feedback
Text (verbatim): "Full Lamination Touch\nDirect, precise interaction for compact interfaces"
Constraints: emphasize low-parallax direct touch feel; keep the finger natural and secondary; do not cover most of the screen
Avoid: exaggerated sci-fi touch beams, cartoon hand styling, cluttered interface, messy reflections

override.cameraDistance: tight front shot that emphasizes touch interaction and compact UI density
copyHighlights: Full-lamination touch reduces visual parallax for direct interaction.
800x1280 resolution suits compact dashboards, control panels and portrait-friendly layouts.
9mm CNC metal body fits portable kits, embedded projects and diagnostic setups.

scenes.label: IMG-03 9mm CNC 金属机身
scenes.objective: 突出 9mm、249g 和 CNC 铝合金，让 7 寸产品看起来精密而不是廉价。
scenes.headline: 9mm Slim CNC Metal Body
compliance: 小产品必须控制镜头畸变
copyLines: 小尺寸更适合侧边微距特写，CNC 倒角要清晰。
让机身看起来像精密工具，而不是玩具。
renderHints: 侧边反光带要窄且利落。
机身厚度轮廓优先于屏幕内容。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon feature image
Primary request: highlight the compact CNC metal build of a 7-inch portable monitor
Scene/backdrop: soft premium studio backdrop with room for text
Subject: 7-inch CNC aluminum monitor shown in a refined 45-degree angle emphasizing its 9mm side profile
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D commercial render
Composition/framing: tight three-quarter crop with the thin edge and compact footprint clearly visible; leave one side open for text
Lighting/mood: premium showroom lighting with sharp side highlights to show machining quality
Color palette: graphite black, soft silver edge highlights, warm-neutral backdrop
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum, laminated display glass, crisp machined edge reflections
Text (verbatim): "9mm Slim CNC Metal Body\n175 x 108 mm footprint | 249g lightweight"
Constraints: keep the proportions realistic to 175 x 108 x 9 mm; make the small product look precise and premium rather than toy-like
Avoid: bulky proportions, cheap plastic feel, cluttered props, overdone mirror reflections

scenes.label: IMG-04 树莓派 / 控制面板场景
scenes.objective: 把 7 寸产品和 SBC、mini PC、控制面板、DIY 项目场景强绑定。
scenes.headline: Built for SBC and Control Panels
scenes.subheadline: Great for Raspberry Pi, mini PC and custom dashboard projects
compliance: 显示器仍需是视觉主角
copyLines: 开发板和短线材只做用途说明，不能抢主角。
界面布局以状态卡片和按钮为主，更符合触摸和控制面板认知。
renderHints: PCB 绿色只点到为止，不要把画面变成电子元件广告。
可让 UI 采用竖向卡片式布局，强化 800x1280 的适配感。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon lifestyle feature image
Primary request: show a 7-inch touch monitor used with a Raspberry Pi or compact control-panel workflow
Scene/backdrop: compact technical desk setup with a small development board, short cables and a clean embedded-workspace mood
Subject: 7-inch touch monitor displaying a compact dashboard beside a Raspberry Pi or mini PC board
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D lifestyle render
Composition/framing: medium close desk shot; monitor remains the hero; board and cable are supporting props only
Lighting/mood: bright controlled lighting that feels precise, technical and reliable
Color palette: black monitor, green PCB, cool interface tones, neutral desk surface
Materials/textures: CNC metal shell, PCB solder-mask finish, crisp dashboard UI, realistic cable materials
Text (verbatim): "Built for SBC and Control Panels\nGreat for Raspberry Pi, mini PC and custom dashboard projects"
Constraints: make the monitor the main subject; keep the development board compact and secondary; show a UI that feels touch-friendly on a small screen
Avoid: giant tower PC props, unreadable micro text, messy electronics clutter, sci-fi fantasy circuitry

override.cameraDistance: tight desk framing that makes the compact 7-inch panel feel deliberate and readable
override.pairedDevice: Raspberry Pi, mini PC or a 13-inch laptop showing a secondary dashboard

scenes.label: IMG-05 掌机与迷你娱乐设备场景
scenes.objective: 突出小尺寸娱乐和掌机/迷你主机兼容，而不是强调高刷电竞。
scenes.headline: Compact Entertainment Screen
scenes.subheadline: Mini HDMI ready with bright IPS color
compliance: 强调便携娱乐和清晰显示

appearance.backdrop: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 18%, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.18), transparent 26%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 24%, rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.14), transparent 18%), linear-gradient(160deg, #070d15 0%, #111b2b 42%, #22273a 100%)

copyLines: 7 寸更适合掌机、复古主机、迷你娱乐设备的陪伴屏叙事。
不要在文案里暗示 144Hz 或电竞级响应。
renderHints: 画面亮度集中在屏幕中央，掌机放右下角做连接提示。
游戏 UI 用大图标和鲜明色块，适合小屏阅读。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon gaming feature image
Primary request: show a 7-inch portable monitor as a compact entertainment screen for handheld and mini-console setups
Scene/backdrop: dark premium setup with a handheld console or mini gaming device near the display
Subject: compact 7-inch black monitor showing a bright retro or handheld-style game UI, with the paired console visible beside it
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D advertising render
Composition/framing: tight dynamic framing that keeps both the monitor and the small paired device in one compact story
Lighting/mood: cinematic but restrained lighting, with the screen as the brightest element
Color palette: dark body, vivid teal and magenta accents, bright retro game colors on screen
Materials/textures: metal shell, glossy display glass, realistic handheld plastic and controls
Text (verbatim): "Compact Entertainment Screen\nMini HDMI ready with bright IPS color"
Constraints: do not imply high-refresh esports performance; emphasize portability and clear visibility instead; keep the setup believable and compact
Avoid: giant RGB battlestation look, extreme motion blur, oversized controllers, noisy backgrounds

override.cameraDistance: tight entertainment framing that keeps the 7-inch display and paired handheld device in one compact story
override.pairedDevice: retro console, handheld emulator or mini console placed beside the display
override.screenContent: bright retro platformer or handheld-game UI with bold icons sized clearly for a 7-inch panel

scenes.label: IMG-06 全接口与一线连接
scenes.objective: 清晰展示紧凑机身下依然完整的接口能力。
scenes.headline: Mini HDMI + Dual USB-C + Audio
scenes.subheadline: Ready for embedded, handheld and mini PC workflows
compliance: 小机身的端口尺度要真实
copyLines: 小尺寸端口位更容易做错比例，切口深度和间距都要克制。
尽量用技术图式留白，不要做拥挤爆炸图。
renderHints: 侧边高光要锐，突出 CNC 端口切边。
端口标签和连线尽量简短。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon infographic feature image
Primary request: create a clean 3D technical render showing the full connectivity of a 7-inch touch monitor
Scene/backdrop: minimal dark-to-light gradient technical backdrop with clear callout space
Subject: side-profile close-up of the 7-inch monitor showing Mini HDMI, full-function USB-C, power USB-C and 3.5mm audio
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D technical product render
Composition/framing: tight side-angle crop on the compact port area with minimal, premium callouts
Lighting/mood: precise detail lighting with crisp edge highlights and visible connector depth
Color palette: black metal body, cool cyan callout accents, neutral technical background
Materials/textures: machined metal sidewall, realistic connector cutouts, subtle brushed finish
Text (verbatim): "Mini HDMI + Dual USB-C + Audio\nReady for embedded, handheld and mini PC workflows"
Constraints: maintain accurate port spacing for a compact 7-inch device; keep the graphic premium and sparse
Avoid: cluttered exploded view, glowing fake ports, inaccurate connector scale, overloaded diagram graphics

scenes.label: IMG-07 VESA 与双扬声器
scenes.objective: 补齐安装扩展和双扬声器卖点，强调这块小屏也适合固定部署。
scenes.headline: VESA Mount Ready
scenes.subheadline: 75 x 75 mm support · Built-in dual speakers
copyLines: VESA 和双扬声器的说明可以让买家跳出“只能手持”的认知。
后壳信息密度不要太高，突出孔位和结构就够。
renderHints: 背壳高光比正面更柔和，保住孔位细节。
让扬声器和 VESA 的层级关系清晰。
scenes.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: Amazon feature image
Primary request: highlight VESA mounting support and built-in dual speakers on a 7-inch portable touch monitor
Scene/backdrop: premium neutral studio background with compact infographic layout zones
Subject: rear three-quarter view of the 7-inch monitor showing the stand structure, VESA area and speaker story
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D commercial render
Composition/framing: rear product view on the left with clean text blocks on the right, designed for easy reading
Lighting/mood: crisp neutral studio lighting with sharp rear-shell highlights and clean edge separation
Color palette: black and graphite body tones, restrained blue-gray accent graphics, neutral backdrop
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum rear shell, precise mount-hole detail, matte support surfaces
Text (verbatim): "VESA Mount Ready\n75 x 75 mm support | Built-in dual speakers"
Constraints: show the rear shell clearly; keep the layout clean and compact; make the product feel serious and install-ready
Avoid: decorative fake vents, random screws, noisy callouts, toy-like proportions
